channel.title: Fix Atlas
channel.description: New AI and developer error fixes from Fix Atlas.

item.title: How to read an error message without guessing
item.description: A repeatable method for separating the first failure from the noise that follows it.

item.title: API errors: status codes, retries, and safe recovery
item.description: How to decide whether an API request should be corrected, delayed, retried, or escalated.

item.title: Authentication and permission errors without exposing secrets
item.description: A safe diagnostic order for invalid keys, forbidden requests, SSH failures, and cloud access problems.

item.title: A diagnostic order for Python and npm install failures
item.description: Find version, platform, build, permission, and dependency problems before deleting lockfiles or environments.

item.title: Container failures from Docker to Kubernetes
item.description: Trace image, startup, port, storage, memory, and health failures in the order they occur.

item.title: GPU and CUDA errors: memory, drivers, and runtime compatibility
item.description: A practical way to distinguish capacity problems from driver, toolkit, package, and container mismatches.

item.title: ComfyUI: CUDA out of memory
item.description: Set batch size to 1 and lower image resolution.

item.title: Cursor: MCP server not working
item.description: Validate the JSON and replace relative paths with absolute paths.

item.title: n8n: webhook not responding
item.description: Activate the workflow before using the production URL.

item.title: Stable Diffusion: black image output
item.description: Try a known compatible VAE.

item.title: Docker: port is already allocated
item.description: Find the process using the port.

item.title: Python: failed building wheel
item.description: Upgrade pip, setuptools, and wheel.

item.title: Ollama: slow response or empty output
item.description: Test with a smaller quantized model.

item.title: npm: ERESOLVE dependency conflict
item.description: Read the first peer dependency conflict in the log.

item.title: Claude Code: permission denied
item.description: Check the file owner and confirm that your current user can edit the project.

item.title: Claude Code: MCP server disconnected
item.description: Run the configured command manually and resolve its first startup error.

item.title: Whisper: ffmpeg not found
item.description: Install FFmpeg using the package method recommended for your operating system.

item.title: Supabase: RLS permission denied
item.description: Confirm the request is authenticated and inspect the current user id.

item.title: Cloudflare Workers: Error 1101: Worker threw exception
item.description: Stream production logs and reproduce one failing request.

item.title: OpenAI API: 429 rate limit exceeded
item.description: Read the error type and headers to distinguish rate limits from quota problems.

item.title: OpenAI API: invalid API key
item.description: Confirm the runtime sees a non-empty key without printing the full secret.

item.title: GitHub: Permission denied (publickey)
item.description: Test the GitHub SSH connection and note which account responds.

item.title: Next.js: hydration mismatch
item.description: Find the first component named in the hydration warning.

item.title: Node.js: JavaScript heap out of memory
item.description: Confirm available system or container memory before raising the Node limit.

item.title: PyTorch: CUDA is not available
item.description: Confirm the operating system sees the GPU with nvidia-smi.

item.title: Hugging Face: 401 unauthorized for gated model
item.description: Open the model page while signed in and request or accept access.

item.title: Ollama: connection refused on port 11434
item.description: Start Ollama and verify the local API from the same environment as the client.

item.title: ComfyUI: missing custom nodes
item.description: Record every missing node name shown by the workflow.

item.title: Docker: Cannot connect to the Docker daemon
item.description: Start Docker Desktop or the operating-system Docker service.

item.title: n8n: execution stuck in running
item.description: Open the execution and identify the last node that actually started.

item.title: ChatGPT: Something went wrong
item.description: Check the OpenAI status page before changing local settings.

item.title: ChatGPT: A network error occurred
item.description: Retry once after checking the OpenAI status page.

item.title: Gemini API: 429 RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED
item.description: Identify the exact quota named in the error and confirm the Google Cloud project.

item.title: Gemini API: 503 UNAVAILABLE
item.description: Retry only transient failures with capped exponential backoff and jitter.

item.title: Gemini API: 403 PERMISSION_DENIED
item.description: Confirm which Google Cloud project owns the key and that the Gemini API is enabled.

item.title: Claude API: 529 overloaded_error
item.description: Capture the request ID and treat 529 as a transient server error.

item.title: Claude API: 400 invalid_request_error
item.description: Log the sanitized error body and identify the first field named in the message.

item.title: Claude API: stream idle timeout - partial response received
item.description: Record the last event and request ID before retrying the incomplete operation.

item.title: Cursor: Named models unavailable
item.description: Check Cursor service status and confirm the model is still available for your plan.

item.title: Docker: could not select device driver with capabilities: [[gpu]]
item.description: Confirm the host driver sees the GPU with nvidia-smi.

item.title: Docker: driver failed programming external connectivity
item.description: Inspect the full daemon message and check whether the host port is already bound.

item.title: Docker: no space left on device
item.description: Inspect host disk, inode, and Docker storage usage before deleting anything.

item.title: pip: externally-managed-environment
item.description: Create a project virtual environment instead of changing the system interpreter.

item.title: pip: subprocess-exited-with-error
item.description: Scroll to the first error emitted by the failed subprocess instead of the final summary.

item.title: pip: Could not find a version that satisfies the requirement
item.description: Confirm the exact package name and remove an impossible version pin.

item.title: npm: ENOENT: no such file or directory, open package.json
item.description: Print the current directory and list its files.

item.title: npm: EACCES: permission denied
item.description: Identify the exact denied path and inspect its owner before changing permissions.

item.title: npm: Missing script: dev
item.description: List the scripts actually defined in the current package.

item.title: Kubernetes: ImagePullBackOff
item.description: Describe the Pod and read the newest pull event verbatim.

item.title: Kubernetes: CrashLoopBackOff
item.description: Describe the Pod and record the last termination reason and exit code.

item.title: Kubernetes: container terminated with exit code 137
item.description: Confirm OOMKilled and compare memory usage with the configured request and limit.

item.title: Vercel: Command npm run build exited with 1
item.description: Open the full build log and find the first real error above the exit-code summary.

item.title: Vercel: 404: NOT_FOUND
item.description: Test the generated deployment URL separately from the custom domain.

item.title: Git: src refspec main does not match any
item.description: Check whether the repository has a commit and print the current branch name.

item.title: Git: failed to push some refs (non-fast-forward)
item.description: Fetch the remote and inspect the commits that differ on each side.
